## Description
Describe what changes this PR introduces.

## Related Issue
Closes #<issue_number>

## Type of Change
- [ ] feat - New feature or functionality for users
- [ ] fix - Bug fix that resolves an issue
- [ ] refactor - Code restructuring without changing functionality
- [ ] docs - Documentation changes only
- [ ] chore - Maintenance tasks, dependencies, config changes
- [ ] test - Adding/updating tests
- [ ] perf - Performance improvements

## Scope (optional)
- [ ] backend
- [ ] frontend
- [ ] database
- [ ] docs
- [ ] misc

## Checklist
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit format
- [ ] This PR is squash-merged into `dev`
- [ ] No breaking changes (or marked with `!`)
